name: Braised Carrots, Apples and Celery
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large nonstick skillet, heat the olive oil until very hot.
2. Add the carrots, red onion, and celery to the skillet.
3. Cook over medium heat until the vegetables begin to slightly caramelize and soften in texture, about 10 minutes.
4. Add the apples, currants, apple juice, vinegar, honey, and dijon mustard.
5. Cover the pan, reduce heat to a simmer, and cook for an additional 10 minutes.
6. Remove the cover and continue cooking over medium-high heat until the liquid has evaporated and the vegetables begin to glaze.
7. Stir in the chopped basil and season with salt and pepper to taste.
8. Serve immediately.
